message:
feat(tests): add 13 SEC-3.4 enforcement state machine tests (bd-3tb30)

Validates action selection determinism, benign→Allow mapping, adversarial
escalation, quarantine terminal state, trigger overrides (e_process_breach,
drift_detected), state transition posterior thresholds, sliding-window
hysteresis anti-flapping, recovery de-escalation, expected-loss matrix
correctness, hash chain integrity through transitions, disabled scorer bypass,
independent per-extension state, and posterior evolution under sustained patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
